title: rosmarinus officinalis var. tournefortii
intro: Rosmarinus officinalis var. tournefortii, also known as Turkish rosemary or Mediterranean rosemary, is a type of evergreen shrub native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and headaches. The health benefits of Rosmarinus officinalis var. tournefortii include its ability to improve cognitive function, reduce stress and anxiety, and support immune function. Rosmarinus officinalis var. tournefortii can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or dried herb, and is often used in traditional medicine and cooking to add flavor and aroma.
